market.title: All Available Spaces
market.subtitle: Filter to find your space — and book in seconds

visitModal.title: Schedule a Visit
visitModal.subtitle: See the space for yourself before you decide
visitModal.feeNote1: The full amount is deducted from your first month's rent once you sign the contract
visitModal.feeNote2: Pay the fee before your visit date — the appointment is only confirmed once payment is received
visitModal.payNote: * After transferring, send a screenshot of the receipt on WhatsApp and we'll confirm your appointment.
visitModal.hint: The Makani Spot team will reach out within 24 hours to confirm your appointment
visitModal.successBody:
Thank you — the Makani Spot team will reach out within 24 hours to confirm your visit.

Remember to transfer 150 EGP via InstaPay or Vodafone Cash
to 01103467711 and send a screenshot of the receipt.

bookingModal.title: Book Your Space
bookingModal.subtitle: We'll reach out within 24 hours to finalize the details
bookingModal.waitlistTitle: ⏳ All units at this space are currently booked
bookingModal.waitlistBody: Join the waitlist and the space owner will reach out as soon as a unit is available. Attach a link to your business profile so they can take a look.
bookingModal.waitlistModalSub: All units are currently booked — the owner will reach out as soon as one opens up
bookingModal.otherActivityPlaceholder: e.g. cotton candy cart, handmade products...
bookingModal.imageHint:
Add a Google Drive link to a photo showing your setup or decor — this helps us prepare the right space for you.
How to share a link: open the photo in Drive → click Share → choose "Anyone with the link" → copy the link and paste it here.
bookingModal.profileHint:
Share a Google Drive link with photos of your brand or business identity — make sure the link is open for viewing.
How to share a link: open the folder in Drive → click Share → choose "Anyone with the link can view" → copy the link and paste it here.
bookingModal.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Is there electricity? Storage? Wi-Fi?...
bookingModal.noUpfrontPay: No upfront payment — we'll reach out to confirm your booking
bookingModal.successBody:
Thank you — your booking request has been received.
The Makani Spot team will reach out within 24 hours.

empty.title: No spaces match your filters
empty.hint: Try adjusting the activity, area, or price

detail.closeCaptionHint: Click outside the image to close · + / − to zoom
detail.loginRequiredBody: Log in to see full details for this space and book it
detail.viewProfileTitle: Click to view this publisher's profile

validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid mobile number (at least 10 digits)
validation.loginRequiredBooking: You need to log in to send a booking request
validation.loginRequiredViewing: You need to log in to request a visit
validation.sendError: We couldn't send your request — check your connection and try again
validation.waitlistSuccessBody:
The space owner will reach out as soon as a suitable unit becomes available.
Your request is saved on the waitlist for {{spaceName}}.

auth2.phoneRequired: Enter a valid mobile number (at least 10 digits)
auth2.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

loginErrors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first — check your inbox
loginErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many login attempts — please wait a moment and try again

signupErrors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered — log in instead
signupErrors.passwordTooShort6: Password is too short — at least 6 characters required
signupErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests sent to this email recently — please wait a moment and try again.

auth2.resendRateLimited: We just sent that email a moment ago — please wait a bit and try again.
auth2.resendSuccess: Email resent. If you still don't see it in a few minutes, get in touch with us.
auth2.googleError: There was a problem with Google: {{error}}

announcements.loginRequiredBody: Log in or create a free account to see the full tender or announcement details
announcements.statusUrgentToday: 🔥 Today is the last day to apply
